headings.text: Outdoor Entertainment Ideas For Desert Homes
Outdoor Entertainment Ideas For Coachella Valley Homes
Looking for ways to elevate your outdoor entertainment experience? Look no further.
The desert heat can damage equipment quite easily. That's why it's important to find a home AV installer in the Coachella Valley to recommend worthy equipment.
An Outdoor Entertainment System That Can Handle The Heat Of Palm Desert, La Quinta, and Neighboring Cities
Outdoor Sound System
Of course, no outdoor entertainment setup is complete without high-quality sound.
Outdoor Lighting
But why stop there? You can also add ambient lighting to your outdoor entertainment area for a truly immersive experience.
AVIR is the best AV system installer in the Coachella Valley and the has access to the highest quality outdoor TVs and outdoor speakers systems.

With these luxury outdoor entertainment ideas, you can create an outdoor space that not only impresses your guests but also brings joy to your own life. So why wait? Start planning your outdoor entertainment area today and experience the magic of outdoor entertainment like never before.
What makes AVIR unique:
AVIR offers a five-year maintenance service agreement, or MSA. This MSA includes additional maintenance outside of warranty to ensure there are no system issues for the end user.
After-hours service: AVIR offers after hours and weekend emergency service and can generally be dispatched to service a system within an hour.

bodyText: MenuHomeServicesBrandsPortfolioAboutExciting PRoductsContactHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingOutdoor Entertainment Ideas For Desert HomesPosted on March 29, 2023Outdoor Entertainment Ideas For Coachella Valley HomesLooking for ways to elevate your outdoor entertainment experience? Look no further.‍With the advancement of technology, you can now create an outdoor entertainment area that is just as impressive as your indoor setup. From 4K projectors to outdoor speakers, there are plenty of options to choose from when it comes to bringing your entertainment outside.‍Picture yourself relaxing outside in your backyard on a beautiful summer evening, surrounded by lush greenery and the sound of a gentle breeze rustling through the trees. You have a cold drink in hand and a plate of delicious food beside you. But there's something missing: the perfect entertainment setup to take your outdoor experience to the next level. That's where outdoor entertainment ideas come into play, and in this article, we'll explore some of the best options available to transform your backyard into an oasis of entertainment and relaxation.‍‍Sunbrite Outdoor TV mounted over an outdoor fireplace in Rancho Mirage, CA.‍‍The desert heat can damage equipment quite easily. That's why it's important to find a home AV installer in the Coachella Valley to recommend worthy equipment.‍Let's start with the centerpiece of your outdoor entertainment area: the display.A 4K projector can provide stunning visuals on a large screen, making you feel like you're watching a movie at a theater. With the ability to project onto a screen, the possibilities for creating a unique and impressive display are endless.‍Some of our clients prefer an LED wall, if they have the space and infrastructure for it, because of the highest levels of brightness available from products such as Sony CLED or Samsung MicroLED systems.‍‍An Outdoor Entertainment System That Can Handle The Heat Of Palm Desert, La Quinta, and Neighboring CitiesWith a high-quality projector, you can enjoy your favorite movies, TV shows, or even sports games on a large screen outdoors. Imagine gathering your family and friends to watch the latest blockbuster movie under the stars, with surround sound speakers and a cozy setup of blankets and pillows.‍Outdoor entertainment systems are designed to withstand the elements, ensuring that you can enjoy your favorite movies, music, and TV shows in any weather condition. When it comes to outdoor TVs, they are designed with features such as high brightness and contrast, anti-glare screens, and weatherproof housing to ensure a clear and vibrant viewing experience. ‍With a motorized mount for your outdoor TV to complete the setup, you can not only adjust the viewing angle of your screen with ease, there are several options that allow you to tuck away a big screen TV into a custom cabinet or into the ceiling of an overhang when not in use.‍If you’re okay with keeping your outdoor TV in plain sight, then we typically specify a lockable outdoor mount for the windy conditions of the Coachella Valley.‍Most integrators forget about this, and homeowners can end up with newly installed TVs that fly around like a shirt in the wind. Not a pleasing sight to come home to!‍‍Sonance landscape speaker system, hidden in the design of the property.‍‍Outdoor Sound SystemOf course, no outdoor entertainment setup is complete without high-quality sound.With the availability of outdoor speakers, you can enjoy crystal clear audio without compromising on aesthetics. Landscape speakers are built with durable materials that can withstand rain, wind, and extreme temperatures while still delivering high-quality audio. Choose from speakers that blend in with your outdoor décor or ones that make a statement on their own. Whether you're hosting a pool party or a barbecue, your guests will appreciate the immersive sound experience.No matter if you're playing some soft background music during dinner or blasting your favorite tunes during a party, outdoor speakers will help create the perfect ambiance for any occasion.‍‍Outdoor LightingBut why stop there? You can also add ambient lighting to your outdoor entertainment area for a truly immersive experience.From string lights to smart lighting systems, you can create the perfect ambiance for any occasion. Imagine sipping cocktails under the stars with soft, warm lighting illuminating your outdoor space.An outdoor entertainment system can transform your backyard into an oasis of entertainment and relaxation. With durable and weather-resistant products that offer exceptional audio and video quality, you can enjoy your favorite content in any weather condition. Plus, with custom lighting and furniture solutions, you can create a beautiful and inviting outdoor space that will make you want to spend more time outside.‍‍‍AVIR is the best AV system installer in the Coachella Valley and the has access to the highest quality outdoor TVs and outdoor speakers systems.With these luxury outdoor entertainment ideas, you can create an outdoor space that not only impresses your guests but also brings joy to your own life. So why wait? Start planning your outdoor entertainment area today and experience the magic of outdoor entertainment like never before.‍‍‍‍What makes AVIR unique:AVIR offers a five-year maintenance service agreement, or MSA. This MSA includes additional maintenance outside of warranty to ensure there are no system issues for the end user.After-hours service: AVIR offers after hours and weekend emergency service and can generally be dispatched to service a system within an hour.‍If you are interested in scheduling for one of our professional engineers to design a system for your remodel or new construction project, and you are in the Coachella Valley or surrounding areas, we may be reached at:Phone: (760) 799-0881Email: Sales@AVIR.com‍Ask for Yasin or Charley.‍‍‍Engage the expertsAVIR operates within the Coachella Valley region, providing exclusive smart automation services for residential and commercial properties.Call760.779.0881Visit our Showroom41905 Boardwalk, Suite XPalm Desert, CA 92211NavigationHomeServicesBrandsExciting ProductsPortfolioAboutCareersContactServicesHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingExciting ProductsBrowse some of the most exclusive products we can bring to your next technology installation.Find out moreProudly serving the entire Coachella Valley and surrounding areas:BanningBeaumontBermuda DunesBig BearCathedral CityCoachellaIdyllwildIndian WellsIndioJoshua TreeLa QuintaLake ArrowheadMoreno ValleyMurrietaPalm DesertPalm SpringsRancho MirageRedlandsRiversideSan BernardinoTemeculaThermalThousand PalmsYucaipaYucca ValleyCopyright © 2023.
